summary.intent: Fix and resolve PR review comments on an open pull request for the moltis repository.
summary.outcome: Merged duplicate std::sync imports in bus.rs, committed the fix, and pushed to the remote branch resolving the PR comment.

repo: The moltis repo uses worktrees under /Users/penso/.superset/worktrees/moltis/ for branch isolation.
The nostr crate (crates/nostr) had duplicate std::sync import statements that needed consolidation.

code.finding: File contained duplicate std::sync imports that were merged into a single import statement.

workflow: PR comments were fetched via Bash before making edits, allowing targeted fixes.
Formatting and tests were verified before committing the fix.
